name: Next Step
description_short: Next Step Resources is a Tennessee-based 501(c)(3) non-profit providing free, confidential reproductive health services including pregnancy testing, STI testing, ultrasounds, and pregnancy decision support.
description_long:
Next Step Resources Center is a non-profit organization based in Dunlap, Tennessee, that has been serving the reproductive health needs of women, men, and families in the region. Operating as a 501(c)(3) charitable organization, the center is committed to providing accessible healthcare information and services to individuals regardless of insurance status or ability to pay. The organization operates a physical clinic location in Dunlap with mobile unit services extending to Kimball, Tennessee, ensuring geographic accessibility across the service area.

The organization offers a comprehensive range of no-cost reproductive health services delivered by licensed medical professionals. These include medical-grade pregnancy testing (99.8% accurate), full-panel STI testing covering chlamydia, gonorrhea, trichomoniasis, and HIV, ultrasound services, and pregnancy decision support consultations. All services are confidential and provided at no charge to patients. The center employs licensed nurses to conduct testing and provides proof-of-pregnancy documentation when needed. For those who have taken the abortion pill and wish to reverse the decision, the organization provides information and referral to the Abortion Pill Reversal Hotline.

What distinguishes Next Step Resources is its explicit non-profit mission focused on reproductive autonomy and informed decision-making rather than profit generation. The organization provides comprehensive educational content through blog articles addressing topics relevant to their patient population, including resources for single mothers, prenatal care access without insurance, and pregnancy-related health questions. Operating hours are designed for accessibility (Monday-Friday with weekend closure), and multiple contact methods are available including phone, email, and online appointment booking. The center explicitly clarifies that while it does not perform or refer for abortion services in Tennessee, it provides factual information on all pregnancy options.

The primary caveat is that Next Step Resources is a specialized reproductive health clinic, not a general consumer finance organization. The miscategorization in the original system reflects confusion about the organization's actual mission. As a free, non-profit health service provider, it serves individuals seeking reproductive health information and testing without financial barriers, making it a legitimate "free-help" resource for those unable to afford or access such services elsewhere. The organization's educational mission and no-cost service model align with other non-profit health and counseling resources.
services: Ultrasound services for pregnancy confirmation and gestational dating
Full-panel STI testing (chlamydia, gonorrhea, trichomoniasis, HIV)
STI treatment provision and partner treatment coordination
Abortion pill reversal information and Hotline referral
Pregnancy and reproductive health education resources
pros: All services are completely free and confidential with no insurance required
Medical-grade pregnancy tests (99.8% accurate) administered by licensed nurses
Full-panel STI testing covering four common infections with treatment provided or referred
Ultrasound services available to confirm viability and gestational age
501(c)(3) non-profit structure ensures mission-driven care without profit incentive
Multiple service locations with mobile unit extending to underserved areas
Proof-of-pregnancy documentation provided for legal or administrative purposes
Comprehensive pregnancy decision support and post-abortion support services
cons: Limited geographic service area (only Dunlap and Kimball, Tennessee locations)
Restricted office hours with no weekend availability may create access barriers for working individuals
Does not provide or refer for abortion services, limiting comprehensiveness of reproductive health options despite Tennessee's legal restrictions
Mobile services limited to Kimball only, requiring Dunlap office visit for full service range
Website content suggests organization focuses primarily on pregnancy options rather than balanced reproductive health counseling
best_for: Uninsured or underinsured women needing confidential pregnancy testing
Individuals seeking free STI testing and treatment in rural Tennessee
Women seeking comprehensive pregnancy information and ultrasound confirmation
People needing pregnancy decision support and counseling resources
diagnosis: Next Step Resources is best for uninsured or underinsured individuals in rural Tennessee seeking free, confidential reproductive health services including pregnancy testing and STI screening. The critical caveat is that this is a specialized non-profit health clinic—not a consumer finance product—and was incorrectly categorized in the original system; it belongs in "free-help" as a non-profit health resource provider.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
